zh.Sandy, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪
zh.Sandy, Bedford, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪
zh.Egerton, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特艾格頓
英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Langley於1522年出生在英國貝德福爾桑迪時，他的父親Edward de Langley I22歲，母親Margery Hungerford23歲。他於1545年與Ann Milton Brydges在英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1572年8月6日之前在英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特艾格頓。

英国英格兰貝德福爾桑迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Langley于1522年出生在英国貝德福爾桑迪时，他的父亲Edward de Langley I22岁，母亲Margery Hungerford23岁。他于1545年与Ann Milton Brydges在英国英格兰貝德福爾桑迪结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1572年8月6日之前在英国英格兰貝德福爾桑迪，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特艾格頓。

nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Langley was born in 1522, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Edward de Langley I, was 22 and his mother, Margery Hungerford, was 23. He married Ann Milton Brydges in 1545, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He died before 6 August 1572, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Egerton, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Langley est né en 1522, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward de Langley I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery Hungerford, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ann Milton Brydges en 1545, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé avant 6 août 1572, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Egerton, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Langley 1522 in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward de Langley I 22 und seine Mutter Margery Hungerford 23. Er hat 1545 in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Ann Milton Brydges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb vor 6. August 1572 in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Egerton, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Langley è nato il nel 1522 nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Edward de Langley I, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margery Hungerford, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ann Milton Brydges nel 1545, nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 6 agosto 1572, nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Egerton, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディ
ja.lifeSummary: Edward Langleyが1522年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディで生まれた時，父Edward de Langley Iは22歳，母Margery Hungerfordは23歳であった。1545年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディでAnn Milton Brydgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1572年8月6日以前にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディで死去し，イギリスイギリスケントエジャートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Langley(이)가 1522년 영국 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward de Langley I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Hungerford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 Ann Milton Brydges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 8월 6일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 거턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Langley nasceu em 1522, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward de Langley I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery Hungerford, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Milton Brydges em 1545, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 6 de agosto de 1572, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Egerton, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Langley родился в 1522 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward de Langley I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Hungerford, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Milton Brydges в 1545 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер перед 6 августа 1572 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности эгиртон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Langley nació en 1522, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward de Langley I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margery Hungerford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ann Milton Brydges en 1545, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 6 de agosto de 1572, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Egerton, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
